news.headline: Clopay Corporation's VertiStack Avante Garage Door wins Best of IBS Award. Largest NA garage door manufacturer.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Mason, Ohio, Clopay Corporation, a subsidiary of Griffon Corporation (NYSE: GFF) and the leading manufacturer and seller of garage doors and rolling steel doors in North America, revealed that its VertiStack Avante garage door had been awarded the Best of IBS prize.

news.headline: Keith E. Sonderling sworn in as Acting Director of IMLS, appointed by President Trump. IMLS is an independent govt agency.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Deputy Secretary of Labor Keith E. Sonderling assumed the position of Acting Director of the Institute of Museum and Library Services (IMLS) following his appointment by President Donald J. Trump. IMLS, an autonomous federal agency, plays a key role in supporting museums and libraries across the United States.

news.headline: Recon Supply awarded Equipment ECAT contract by DLA, highlighting their ability to provide mission-critical equipment.
news.summary: A company based in St. Charles, Missouri, Recon Supply, known for essential equipment and logistics services, has secured a significant contract from the Defense Logistics Agency (DLA). The contract specifically pertains to an Equipment ECAT (Electronic Catalog) and marks a notable achievement for the company in the year 2025.

news.headline: Global Elastomeric Infusions Pumps market valued at USD 678.38M in 2024, expected to reach USD 1,369.81M by 2034 with a 7.28% CAGR.
news.summary: The research report by Custom Market Insights highlights the Elastomeric Infusions Pumps Market, indicating that the market size was approximately USD 678.38 million in 2024, anticipated to reach USD 727.77 million in 2025, and is projected to escalate to about USD 1,369.81 million by 2034, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of roughly 7.28% during the forecast period 2025 to 2034. Key trends shaping the market include the integration of digital technologies, expansion of home healthcare services, growing demand in emerging markets, strategic partnerships and collaborations in the industry, focus on research and development, and the rising prevalence of chronic diseases driving the need for reliable and cost-effective medication delivery systems. This growth is attributed to the transformation of traditional infusion pumps into intelligent systems, responding to the increased use of decentralized care models, and catering to the rising number of patients with chronic illnesses. These trends are reshaping market dynamics and creating substantial growth opportunities for innovative manufacturers globally in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Toll Brothers opens Enclave at Kelsey Creek luxury home community in Bellevue, WA, near top employers, with 17 acres of green space.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, on March 20, 2025, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), the top luxury home builder in the US, unveiled its new Seattle-area Enclave at Kelsey Creek community. The site boasts 17 acres of lush green space and is now accessible to the public. Situated in proximity to major employers, shops, and renowned educational institutions, the community promises a secluded and convenient living experience.

news.headline: Canada's PM Carney cuts GST on homes up to $1 mln for first-time buyers.
InvestBev Credit partners with Lofted Custom Spirits to offer $50 million in barrel inventory lending, helping clients optimize capital.
news.summary: A recent partnership is offering inventive financial options for Lofted Spirits customers to manage market changes and maximize capital by utilizing aging barrel inventory. The collaboration involves InvestBev Credit, a top financial services firm in the alcohol industry based in Chicago. This development was announced on March 20, 2025. The partnership aims to assist Lofted Spirits clients in navigating market fluctuations, potentially securing optimal funding solutions.

news.headline: Canary Capital applying for SEC approval to launch ETF with PUDGY NFT and PENGU token.
news.summary: A request for approval from the SEC has been submitted by Crypto asset manager Canary Capital. The application is for the launch of an Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) that would include a combination of Pudgy Penguins NFTs and the PENGU token. This move indicates a new trend in the market with the merging of NFTs and tokens in investment products. The specific details of the ETF, including the quantities of NFTs and tokens to be included, have not been disclosed. This development marks an important step in the integration of digital assets into traditional investment vehicles.

news.headline: Bradley Cooper's film about caregiving to premiere on PBS June 24, streaming starts May 27. Uzo Aduba narrates. Collaboration with Fred Rogers Productions. Well Beings campaign involved with 18 original projects.
news.summary: Actress Uzo Aduba, known for her acclaimed performances, will be narrating a documentary focusing on the history, challenges, and successes of caregiving in the United States. This project is a collaboration between Fred Rogers Productions and will incorporate special content from a popular children's series. Set to be released in the fall of 2025, this documentary is part of the Well Beings Campaign and will feature 18 original pieces.

news.headline: DEUS EX MACHINA receives €2M EU funding for AI platform to boost food industry sustainability.
news.summary: A recently awarded €2 million grant will expedite the advancement of an artificial intelligence platform designed to tackle sustainability issues within the food industry. This initiative aims to not only create new revenue streams but also to offer consumers and pets improved, more cost-effective food options. The project is based in Athens, Greece and the announcement was made on March 20, 2025 by the organization DEUS EX MACHINA.

news.headline: Oportun responds to Findell Capital's public letter; no specific numbers provided.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in San Carlos, California, Oportun (Nasdaq: OPRT), a socially responsible financial services firm, released a statement addressing a public letter from Findell Capital Management LLC.

news.headline: Ethereum co-founder Joe Lubin reveals insights on Ethereum future at DAS, discusses importance of L2 scaling networks. Over 140 solutions available for Ethereum scaling, leading to drop in gas fees. Ether prices hit $1,759 in March 2025, amid outflows from Ether ETFs.
news.summary: Ethereum co-founder Joe Lubin discussed the importance of layer-2 scaling networks for the Ethereum ecosystem at the Digital Asset Summit. There are over 140 scaling solutions for Ethereum, including 60 rollup networks. Critics argue that layer-2 networks drain the base layer of revenue without adding significant value. Following the Dencun upgrade in March 2024, Ethereum's average gas fee dropped by 95%. This led to a 99% decrease in revenue on the base layer by September 2024. Ether's price hit a recent low of $1,759 on March 11, with analysts predicting further declines in 2025. ETH ETFs saw outflows for 11 consecutive days, with a significant $73.6 million pulled out on March 13, reflecting a broader downturn in the crypto market.There is hope for Ethereum with the upcoming launch of MegaETH, but concerns remain about the potential costs involved.

news.headline: Reese Marketos wins $52M trial for Cardinal Midstream against Energy Transfer in contract dispute.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, a state court in Beaver County, Pennsylvania ruled in favor of Cardinal Midstream II, LLC in a contract dispute against Energy Transfer, LP and related entities. The court awarded Cardinal Midstream II, LLC a total of $51.98 million in an earnout payment owed to them. This conclusion marked the end of a lengthy legal battle between the two parties.

news.headline: Friday FX Option Expiries
Peter Schiff criticizes strategic Bitcoin reserve as scam to lure Americans into buying more crypto under Trump's influence, predicting record speculative losses.
news.summary: Bitcoin critic Peter Schiff has criticized the strategic Bitcoin reserve, claiming it is designed to deceive Americans into making risky investments. In a recent post, Schiff accused the reserve of being a scam to lure more Americans into buying cryptocurrency. He warned that under President Donald Trump's influence, more Americans are likely to suffer financial losses in crypto compared to any previous speculative frenzy. Schiff singled out the TRUMP coin as an example of this misleading tactic. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Smart money inflows into Salesforce despite mixed Q4 earnings, potential macroeconomic pressures. Revenue: $9.99B, below consensus of $10.03B. Fiscal year 2026 revenue guidance: $40.5-40.9B, below analyst expectations. Stock shows support at $270 level. Company invested $1B in Singapore's AI sector. Analysts rate Salesforce stock as Buy.
news.summary: Investors are seeking ways to protect their wealth amid recession fears and trade wars by turning to alternative investments. Some are considering rotating back into technology firms like Salesforce Inc (NYSE:CRM), despite risks. Salesforce recently reported mixed fourth-quarter earnings, with earnings of $2.78 per share surpassing estimates, but revenue of $9.99 billion missing expectations. The company's fiscal year 2026 revenue guidance of $40.5-$40.9 billion was lower than analyst forecasts of $41.375 billion, leading to volatility in the stock. However, recent developments such as a $1 billion investment in Singapore's AI sector and optimistic analyst ratings indicate potential support for Salesforce stock.

news.headline: Angelalign Technology reports steady growth in 2024, driven by global expansion & digital innovation, releasing financial results.
news.summary: In its recent announcement on March 20, 2025, Angelalign Technology Inc. disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year 2024. The Company, listed as 6699.HK on the stock exchange, reported impressive growth attributed to its increasing presence in global markets and ongoing advancements in digital orthodontics.

news.headline: Regulator puts 35 workers on leave without notice in consumer protection, equal opportunity, and research units.
news.summary: The National Treasury Employees Union reported that employees working in consumer protection, equal opportunity, and research units did not receive any prior notice.

news.headline: Beazer Homes raised $3 million for Fisher House Foundation on National Day of Service with employees across 17 cities.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Beazer Homes, a prominent homebuilding company, recently showcased their strong dedication to community service with their National Day of Service on March 14th. The event saw almost all Beazer employees, as well as partners and suppliers, coming together in 17 cities across the country. This widespread initiative highlighted Beazer's commitment not only to constructing homes but also to nurturing vibrant and sustainable neighborhoods. The volunteers participated in various activities benefiting local nonprofits, showcasing Beazer's focus on giving back to the community.

news.headline: MAC.BID opens second location in San Antonio, creating 50+ local jobs, expanding retail and warehouse space.
news.summary: A Pennsylvania-headquartered online auction firm is expanding its presence in San Antonio, with the opening of a second warehouse and retail space. The move by MAC.BID will result in the creation of over 50 new job opportunities in the local area. This development was disclosed on March 20, 2025, marking a significant expansion in the company's operations.

news.headline: ESA launches Accessible Games Initiative with founding members EA, Google, Microsoft, Nintendo, Ubisoft at GDC. Accessibility tags to support players. Washington, Mar 20, 2025.
news.summary: Today at the Game Developers Conference (GDC), the Entertainment Software Association (ESA) revealed a significant development in gaming accessibility. Founding members Electronic Arts, Google, Microsoft, Nintendo of America, and Ubisoft, along with ESA, introduced new accessibility tags aimed at enhancing support for players. This initiative was announced in Washington on March 20, 2025. The Accessible Games feature marks a pivotal step towards inclusivity in the gaming industry, spotlighting the commitment of key players in promoting a more accessible gaming environment.

news.headline: EU postpones imposing 50% tariffs on US Whiskey, encouraging further negotiations. Market update: 03/20/2025.
news.summary: The European Union has decided to postpone the implementation of a 50% tariff on US whiskey, offering a window for further negotiations. This move comes amid discussions to resolve trade tensions between the EU and the US. The delay in tariffs presents an opportunity for both parties to engage in additional talks and potentially reach a mutually beneficial agreement. The decision was made on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Founder and Editor of Mother Jones, Jeffrey Bruce Klein, dies at 77. Co-founded in 1976 and later returned as editor in chief in the 1990s.
news.summary: One of four journalists co-founded a progressive magazine in 1976, later becoming its editor in chief again in the 1990s.

news.headline: MITRE, NVIDIA collaborate on Walsh Imaging, a quantum system that produces nanoscale images for security, medicine, & microelectronics.
news.summary: MITRE and NVIDIA have joined forces to enhance quantum imaging system design and optimization through collaboration on simulation tools. The innovative Walsh Imaging system developed by MITRE enables the visualization of nanoscale electromagnetic signals for real-time monitoring of reactions in semiconductors and brain neurons. This cutting-edge technology has vast applications in security, healthcare, and microelectronics industries.

news.headline: Infleqtion introduces Contextual Machine Learning (CML) at GTC 2025, enhancing AI capabilities, utilizing NVIDIA CUDA-Q & Quantum-Inspired Algorithms.
news.summary: Infleqtion, a top player in quantum information technologies, announced the launch of Contextual Machine Learning (CML) at GTC 2025 event in Boulder, Colo. CML, a new AI technique, enables machine learning models to handle data over extended periods and from various sources concurrently. This advancement boosts AI's capability to identify patterns in sensor data, forecast trends, and enhance real-time decision-making accuracy. The integration of CML on NVIDIA A100 GPUs has been pivotal in this innovation.

news.headline: Money-market fund assets fall to $7 trillion - ICI.
Study in Journal of Emergency Nursing reveals factors related to burnout in ED nurses. Luminary Anne Manton honored.
news.summary: The Journal of Emergency Nursing, based in Schaumburg, Illinois, released its March 2025 issue and highlighted a remarkable figure in the field of emergency nursing. The issue, which includes significant articles, pays tribute to Anne Manton, a legendary figure in emergency nursing who recently passed away.

news.headline: Dickson introduces TotalCare with 24/7 Global Assist for environmental monitoring support, ensuring swift responses anytime, anywhere.
news.summary: Global assistance for environmental monitoring is now available around the clock with 24/7 support services. Located in Addison, Illinois, this service was launched on March 20, 2025. It offers rapid assistance to tackle temperature and humidity monitoring problems promptly, ensuring critical issues are addressed without delay. This service enables businesses to minimize disruptions and maintain proper environmental conditions at all times.

news.headline: Market Force Info revealed insights from survey on US wireless carriers: study surveyed 3,800 consumers.
news.summary: Atlanta, March 20, 2025 - Market Force Information, a key player in customer experience management, has released important findings from its recent consumer survey concentrating on wireless carriers in the U.S. The survey, which polled more than 3,800 wireless consumers, highlighted...

news.headline: BofA appoints Jason Edelmann as President of Fort Lauderdale market, aiming to enhance connections and drive growth.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on March 20, 2025, Bank of America announced the appointment of Jason Edelmann as the president of Bank of America Fort Lauderdale. In his new role, Edelmann will oversee operations and serve as the primary leader for the market. His responsibilities include facilitating connections between clients, team members, and local communities to maximize the bank's offerings. This move is part of Bank of America's strategy to enhance its presence in Fort Lauderdale by leveraging Edelmann's leadership skills and experience.

news.headline: PCCA appoints Gus Bassani, PharmD, as CEO of its U.S. business unit, effective April 1, 2025.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Houston, PCCA, a top supplier of active pharmaceutical ingredients and consulting for compounding industry, revealed that Gus Bassani, PharmD, will take over as CEO of its U.S. division starting April 1. PCCA is registered with the FDA and provides essential ingredients and services for compounding.

news.headline: Quantum Rings integrates quantum simulation with NVIDIA CUDA-Q, enhancing GPU-accelerated quantum circuit simulation.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in San Jose, California, Quantum Rings revealed their latest development in quantum simulation technology by merging it with NVIDIA CUDA-Q. This new integration offers GPU-accelerated quantum circuit simulation to a global audience of researchers, developers, and businesses. The collaboration aims to enhance the efficiency and speed of quantum computing tasks.

news.headline: Education workers in Calgary and Sturgeon accept settlements, ending strikes. CUPE 520 votes 93% in favor, CUPE 4625 votes 80% for settlement. Return to work: Monday at Calgary Catholic, March 31 at Sturgeon.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, two additional CUPE locals recently approved tentative agreements, leading to the conclusion of strikes at the Calgary Catholic and Sturgeon School Divisions. Members of CUPE 520 at the Calgary Catholic School Division supported their settlement with an overwhelming 93% vote in favor. Likewise, CUPE 4625 members at the Sturgeon School Division approved their agreement with an 80% majority. The return to work is slated for Monday at Calgary Catholic schools and March 31 at Sturgeon schools. Currently, only one group of education support workers remains on strike.

Lyft plans to launch driverless ride-hails as early as this summer.
Popilush unveils BRXL Activewear line in NYC, merging shapewear and sport, inspiring confidence.

news.headline: Germany, Italy, Poland, UK, and Canadian leaders are to meet in Paris next week to discuss Ukraine.
Lockheed Martin vows Canada jobs if Ottawa buys a full F-35 order - Globe. $LMT
Don Francisco's Coffee introduces new limited-edition Chocolate Raspberry flavor for spring, available online only.
news.summary: Don Francisco's Coffee, a prominent premium coffee brand, has introduced its exclusive limited-edition flavor, Chocolate Raspberry, accessible solely online for a brief period. Launched on March 20, 2025, this new flavor is the most recent addition to the company's product lineup.

news.headline: Bull Shark card game live on Kickstarter, created by Haminations for chaotic bluffing fun. YouTuber's second campaign.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on March 20, 2025, Bull Shark, an uproarious card game created by Bryson from Haminations and Wombo Combo Games, is now available on Kickstarter for support. With a fun and unpredictable gameplay, players can bluff, trick, and steal their way to success, but must avoid getting caught. The game is the brainchild of popular Youtuber Haminations and marks his second Kickstarter campaign.

news.headline: ISCDD honors Sharon Mates, PhD, and Steven Paul, MD with leadership award at 23rd Annual Meeting in Las Vegas.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Las Vegas, the International Society for CNS Drug Development (ISCDD) made an announcement via PRNewswire. The ISCDD is a non-profit organization focused on advancing central nervous system drug development. They stated that Sharon Mates, PhD, and Steven Paul, MD, have been appointed to key positions.

news.headline: Lockheed Martin offers to create jobs in Canada - Globe. $LMT
Steer Health introduces SteerConnect, an AI-driven platform to simplify patient care access, enhancing efficiency.
news.summary: A cutting-edge platform has been introduced by Steer Health, a prominent AI-powered healthcare solutions provider based in Dallas on March 20, 2025. This innovative platform aims to eradicate the inefficiency of constant scrolling and the frustration of dead-ends in healthcare services. With smart triage, personalized care matching, and immediate information on provider availability, the platform revolutionizes the way individuals access healthcare. By leveraging artificial intelligence, Steer Health's platform ensures efficient and tailored care solutions to users.

news.headline: Douglas B. Price recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for Estate Planning and Probate Law.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Tempe, Arizona, Douglas B. Price, Attorney, was recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle for his notable work in Estate Planning and Probate Law. This recognition highlights Price's expertise in the field.

news.headline: Ryan C. Barnes recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for Industrial Safety Helmet Production.

Barnes has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle for his significant contributions to Industrial Safety Helmet Production. Barnes, a prominent figure in the industry, has been acknowledged for his achievements in this sector.

news.headline: ZachXBT reveals $20M profits by the 50x Hyperliquid whale, identified as British hacker William Parker. Source links past fraud cases.
news.summary: A British hacker named William Parker, previously known as Alistair Packover, was identified by Onchain sleuth ZachXBT as the mysterious whale who profited $20 million from highly leveraged trades on Hyperliquid and GMX. Parker had been arrested for stealing $1 million from two casinos in 2023 and had a history of hacking and gambling. The whale trader caused a $4 million loss in Hyperliquid's liquidity pool by intentionally liquidating an approximately $200 million Ether long position. The whale trader's wallet addresses were associated with past phishing schemes, and they took another multimillion-long position on Chainlink. Hyperliquid revised its collateral rules to prevent such incidents in the future. The whale trader utilized leverage of up to 50x on decentralized perpetual exchanges. Cointelegraph has not independently verified ZachXBT’s claims.

news.headline: UK fraudster identified as high-risk Bitcoin whale, linked to $20M in profits from crypto trades. Previous history includes $1M casino theft and fraud charges. Raised concerns over use of stolen funds in DeFi.
news.summary: An in-depth investigation by on-chain analyst ZachXBT has connected the Hyperliquid whale, a trader who made profits amounting to $20 million through high-leverage cryptocurrency trades, to a British online scammer. This individual, identified as William Parker, previously known as Alistair Packover, had been arrested in 2023 for stealing around $1 million from two Finnish casinos and had faced fraud charges in the UK in the 2010s. The results of the investigation were disclosed in a series of posts on X on Thursday, revealing that the trader's wallet activities reportedly included funds obtained through phishing scams and exploiting casinos. These findings have sparked concerns regarding the utilization of stolen funds in decentralized finance. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

Keystone leases 4,679 sq ft to Madis Coffee Roasters at The Curtis in Philadelphia, set to open on March 21, 2025.
news.summary: A 4,679-square-foot space at The Curtis in Philadelphia's Independence Mall has been leased by Keystone to Madis Coffee Roasters of University City. The lease agreement is long-term and the new location is set to open on March 21, 2025. Madis, renowned for its precision in coffee roasting and community connections, selected The Curtis as their second location. This space will provide a unique coffee experience showcasing the art of coffee roasting.
